title: Plushy+
description: Adds our custom plushy collection in to Minecraft.
body:
## What is Plushy+? Plushy+ is a mod that adds a few dolls/plushies to the game, over time we will add more plushies to the mod.     ## Who is this mod for? Plushy+ is for whom ever wants it, if you don't like the mod simple don't download it and don't user it, if it's on a server your on, just don't make them, Minecraft is about playing your game your way, so don't let anyone change your story within Minecraft.



## Befriend Your NitWits: 1.3.1.0 and below
The Nitwit might just drop something useful for you or even a rare plushie ## Plushy+ News: Plushy+ is back, we have 87 plushies at this time, this works on your single player world and servers as long as they have it installed. Our recipes are much more simpler with no more stuffer block and the reason for this change was to make it easier for users to use it whom are new to mods. Please use a recipes mod to view all recipes as we now have over 80 recipes. Since of **1.3.1.1** all recipes part from the fabric and The Crash Test Dolly are now stone cutter recipes just put the Crash Test Dolly in to the stone cutter.   ## Can I use Plushy+ in my ModPack? Plushy+ is a mod for users to use, so yes, use it in your ModPack, just never try and take credit for our work. ## Will you port it to XYZ? No, we will release for versions we use so we can test, we wont be releasing for any version what isn't out, please don't ask, these comments will not be replied to, I will support newer version of Minecraft if I believe it's going to be used some sub versions will not be used, like 1.21.1/4/8 is supported, we might support 1.22 next but Mojang are making it hard to keep things going so we will only release for versions we feel fits. ## How can I use your fabric in my mod or using a recipe editor? You can use c:plush_fabric for all our fabric colours or c:plush_fabric/white to use lets say the white fabric, full tag list can be found [here](https://github.com/TheShadowModsUK/plushyPlusWiki/blob/main/tags/fabric/readme.md), on our github. ### Supporting The Mods? Would you like to support us? consider our patreon, to help keep our lights on and our tummies full. [https://www.patreon.com/TSMUK](https://www.patreon.com/TSMUK) thanks guys, if you make videos and love our mods, consider making a review video, can't do these two things? then simple, Follow us on twitter, and comment on this page to tell us what you like and dislike about our work. Most importantly **ENJOY** yourself. **Copyright Note**: Some characters and designs in this project are inspired by intellectual property owned by their respective rights holders. Below is a list of referenced IPs and their owners. - Minecraft Charaters - **Mojang([Microsoft](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.microsoft.com%252fen-gb%252f)) [[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.minecraft.net%252fen-us)]** - Lotso - **The Walt Disney Company [[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fthewaltdisneycompany.com%252f)]** - Cow and Chicken - **Cartoon Network(Warner Bros) [[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.warnerbros.com%252f)]** - Feathers McGraw - **Aardman [[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.aardman.com%252f)]** - Twilight Sparkle - **Hasbro [[Here](https://corporate.hasbro.com/en-us)]** - Spyro - **Activision Blizzard(Micosoft) [[Here](https://www.activisionblizzard.com/)]** We have created all textures from scratch, but we acknowledge the original IP ownership of the referenced characters. If any rights holder requests the removal of their IP references, we will comply and remove the associated designs promptly. All textures, assets, and original work in this project are copyrighted by [**Regressia UK**](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fregressia.uk%252f). While we retain copyright over our creations, the names, likenesses, and rights associated with referenced characters remain the property of their respective owners.
